title: Xenophyllum lycopodioides
taxonomy: Xenophyllum lycopodioides belongs to the family Plantaginaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the plantain family. It is a member of the genus Xenophyllum, which is primarily found in the Americas. Within the family Plantaginaceae, Xenophyllum lycopodioides is classified as a species of flowering plant that exhibits unique characteristics. The species is further classified as a type of shrub or subshrub, with a growth habit that distinguishes it from other members of the family. Its classification is closely related to other members of the genus Xenophyllum, which share similar characteristics and growth habits.
